name: The Awareness
effect: Generate measurable brand presence across all relevant audiences. This card is considered top-of-funnel.

clauses.name: IMPRESSION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If an impression is served: Brand awareness is considered increased.

clauses.name: ATTRIBUTION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If revenue cannot be traced to this card: Awareness remains the upstream cause.

clauses.name: RECALL PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If no one remembers the ad: The frequency is considered insufficient.
